---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an improvement or new capability
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary
A one-line description of the feature.

## Problem it solves
What gap or pain point does this address?

## Proposed solution
How you'd like it to work. CLI flags, TUI menu option, config setting, etc.

## Platform scope
- [ ] All platforms
- [ ] QNAP only
- [ ] Synology only
- [ ] Generic Linux only
- [ ] New platform adapter (specify: _______)

## Alternatives considered
Other approaches you've thought about.

## Additional context
Mockups, links, related issues, etc.
